table_summary: Харилцагчийн дансны үлдэгдлийн өдрийн дэлгэрэнгүй мэдээллийг агуулсан харагдац. Энэ нь харилцагчдын харилцах дансны мэдээллийг хамарна. (A comprehensive view providing daily snapshots of customer account balances. This includes current accounts (CA) used for customer transactions. Use this for customer account balance queries.)

column_descriptions.txn_date: Гүйлгээний огноо (Transaction Date). The snapshot date for the account balance. **This is the most important column for time-based queries. To find the latest state, use MAX(txn_date).** Sample values: '2025-01-15', '2025-02-01'.
column_descriptions.acnt_code: Дансны дугаар (Account Code). The unique identifier for the customer account. This is the primary key for joining account-related data. Sample values: '5001234567', 'MN270050005001234567'.
column_descriptions.acnt_name: Дансны нэр (Account Name). The descriptive name of the customer account. Sample values: 'ХААН БАНК - 300 ТЭРБУМ', 'ХААН БАНК-АСЕМ', 'ГАЗАР ТАРИАЛАН - ХААН БАНК'.
column_descriptions.customer_code: Харилцагчийн дугаар (Customer Code). The unique identifier for the customer. Sample values: '9360000005', '9360000006'.
column_descriptions.customer_name: Харилцагчийн нэр (Customer Name). The name of the customer (individual or organization). Sample values: 'ХААН БАНК', 'НЬЮ ЯАРМАГ ХАУСИНГ ПРОЖЕКТ ХХК', 'ТӨРИЙН БАНК'.
column_descriptions.prod_code: Бүтээгдэхүүний код (Product Code). The code identifying the account product type. Sample values: '21020101', '21010101', '21040101'.
column_descriptions.prod_name: Бүтээгдэхүүний нэр (Product Name). The descriptive name of the account product. Sample values: 'ТУСГАЙ НӨХЦӨЛТЭЙ ЭХ ҮҮСВЭРИЙН ҮЛДЭГДЭЛ', 'БАЙГУУЛЛАГЫН ХАРИЛЦАХ', 'БАНК, САНХҮҮГИЙН БАЙГУУЛЛАГААС БАЙРШУУЛСАН ХАРИЛЦАХ'.
column_descriptions.acnt_type: Дансны төрөл (Account Type). The type code for the account. Sample values: 'CA' (Current Account/Харилцах). Note: SA (Savings/Хадгаламж) exists but not currently used.
column_descriptions.acnt_type_name: Дансны төрлийн нэр (Account Type Name). The descriptive name of the account type. Sample values: 'Харилцах'.
column_descriptions.acnt_manager: Данс хариуцсан ажилтаны дугаар (Account Manager Code). The employee ID of the account manager. Sample values: '10097', '10158'.
column_descriptions.acnt_manager_name: Данс хариуцсан ажилтны нэр (Account Manager Name). The name of the account manager. Sample values: 'ТҮВШИНХҮН Ж', 'ӨЛЗИЙХҮҮ Д'.
column_descriptions.open_date: Данс нээсэн огноо (Open Date). The date when the account was opened. Sample values: '2020-05-15', '2022-01-01'.
column_descriptions.closed_date: Данс хаасан огноо (Closed Date). The date when the account was closed (NULL if still open). Sample values: NULL, '2024-06-30'.
column_descriptions.status: Дансны төлөв (Account Status). The current status of the account. Sample values: 'O' (Open/Active), 'C' (Closed), 'N' (New), 'D' (Deleted).
column_descriptions.cur_code: Дансны валютын төрөл (Currency). The currency code for the account balance. Sample values: 'MNT', 'USD', 'EUR'. **Always SELECT with monetary values. GROUP BY for aggregations.**
column_descriptions.current_bal: Одоогийн үлдэгдэл (Current Balance). The account balance as of the txn_date. The currency is determined by 'cur_code'. **This is the balance column.** Sample values: 5000000000.0, 250000000.0, 0.
